name: 12dpl-lang-server
description: Language server and VS Code extension for 12dPL, the programming language of 12d Model.
author: Ben Olsen

12dpl.compiler.availableFlags.description: List of cc4d compiler flags to show as checkboxes when compiling. Each entry may include arguments, e.g. '-log "build.log"' or '-codepage 1252'.

12dpl.compiler.path.description: Path to the folder containing the cc4d.exe compiler. Example: C:\Program Files\12d\12dmodel\15.00\nt.x64\

12dpl.compiler.includePaths.description: List of folders to prepend to the PATH environment variable before running the compiler (useful for include directories). Use platform paths; on Windows use semicolon-separated PATH semantics.

12dpl.compiler.defaultFlags.description: Default cc4d flags to preselect in the compile checkbox picker. Last selection is remembered per-workspace.

12dpl.formatOnSave.description: Auto-format 12dPL files when they are saved.

12dpl.indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indent level used by the 12dPL formatter (also controls how many spaces a tab counts as when indentStyle is 'spaces').

enumDescriptions: Use the editor.insertSpaces setting to decide (default).
Always indent with spaces, replacing any existing tab indentation.
Always indent with tabs, replacing any existing space indentation.
12dpl.formatter.indentStyle.description: Controls whether the formatter uses spaces or tabs for indentation, overriding the editor.insertSpaces setting. 'editor' defers to VS Code's setting.

12dpl.formatter.preserveBlankLines.description: When enabled, blank lines keep their original whitespace during formatting. This prevents format-on-save from moving the cursor to column 0 when it is positioned on a blank line.

enumDescriptions: Place opening braces at the end of the preceding statement line (K&R style).
Place opening braces on their own line (Allman style).
12dpl.formatter.bracketStyle.description: Controls where opening braces are placed during formatting. 'preserve' leaves braces unchanged; 'same-line' moves lone opening braces up to the previous line (K&R); 'new-line' moves trailing opening braces onto their own line (Allman).

12dpl.formatter.maxLineLength.description: Maximum line length before the formatter inserts a line break at the nearest safe point (after a comma or logical operator). Set to 0 to disable (default).

langServer.maxNumberOfProblems.description: Controls the maximum number of problems produced by the server.

langServer.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server.

scripts.postinstall: cd client && bun install && cd ../server && bun install && cd ..
scripts.test:all: bun run compile && bun test tests
